message:
feat(render,harness): sync bracket flicker-free completeness proof (bd-1q5.5)

Add cursor-hiding fallback to Presenter when DEC 2026 sync brackets are
unsupported (cursor hide/show instead of sync begin/end). Add tracing span
render.sync_bracket with bracket_supported, fallback_used, frame_bytes
fields and WARN log on fallback engagement.

30 proof tests covering: pairing (6), enclosure (4), fallback (6),
multi-frame consistency (2), state machine (2), inline renderer (2),
determinism (2), adversarial (2), stress (3), JSONL evidence (1).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
